description: A customer disputes their water bill, claiming the meter reading must be wrong.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the bill in question.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the customer's account and the disputed bill.

nodes.task_description: Review the meter reading history for anomalies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the history and sees a consistent pattern of usage, with no obvious errors.

nodes.task_description: Explain the findings to the customer and offer to schedule a meter accuracy test.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates the findings and offers a path to resolution for the customer.
